currentTask.name: Gate Plugin Discovery: convention-based gate plugins replacing hardcoded delegation in phase-gate.sh
currentTask.goal: Implement the first structural upgrade from 9Router comparative analysis: convert phase-gate.sh from hardcoded delegation to convention-based plugin discovery. Create scripts/gates/{phase}/ directory structure with 8 plugin wrappers. Add scope-check gate plugin. Add smoke tests for plugin discovery.

environment.note: Configure per-workspace in your agent runtime config (e.g., OpenCode at `$HOME/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc`, Claude Code at `.claude/settings.json`).
environment.topicFoldersPath: Change to your topic folders parent

whatChanged: Gate Plugin Discovery: phase-gate.sh quality checks section replaced hardcoded case statement with auto-discovery from scripts/gates/{phase}/*.sh

scripts/gates/ directory created with 8 plugin wrappers (research/sufficiency, plan/catfish, plan/scope-check, implement/comprehension, implement/preflight, implement/decisions, implement/autonomy, verify/quality-speed)
plan/scope-check.sh NEW --- checks scope boundedness from plan.json, session-state, and task intake (previously unmplemented check)
Each gate plugin is a standalone script with standard exit codes: 0=pass, 1=fail, 2=warn, 3=skip
commands/plan.md and commands/implement.md updated to document plugin-based discovery
test-smoke.sh P12 added: 6 gate plugin discovery tests
filesTouched: scripts/gates/research/sufficiency.sh (NEW --- 2.1K, auto-discovers research note, calls research-sufficiency.sh)
scripts/gates/plan/scope-check.sh (NEW --- 2.9K, checks scope boundedness from plan.json + session-state)
scripts/gates/implement/comprehension.sh (NEW --- 1.7K, auto-discovers comprehension evidence, calls comprehension-gate.sh)
scripts/gates/implement/preflight.sh (NEW --- 1.5K, reads current task from session-state, calls implement-preflight.sh)
scripts/gates/implement/decisions.sh (NEW --- 2.4K, checks decision-log.jsonl for pending decisions and key decision types)
scripts/phase-gate.sh (REWORKED --- quality checks section replaced with auto-discovery engine, -60 lines)
scripts/test-smoke.sh (ADDED --- P12: 6 gate plugin discovery tests)
verification: All 74 smoke tests pass (0 regressions, up from 68)
phase-gate.sh implement --check-quality discovers 4 plugins (autonomy, comprehension, decisions, preflight)
phase-gate.sh review --check-quality shows info message (no gate plugins for review phase)
phase-gate.sh without --check-quality skips quality section entirely
All gate plugins return standard exit codes (0/1/2/3)
Each plugin can run independently: bash scripts/gates/<phase>/<name>.sh
Backward compatible: all existing 68 tests pass unchanged
keyLearnings: 7 of 10 unsolved Path D decision types (model-selection, file-level edit, escalation routing, plan confidence, risk-adjusted autonomy, commit-vs-checkpoint) are now natural gate plugin candidates --- each becomes a file in scripts/gates/<phase>/<name>.sh
The gate plugin pattern mirrors 9Router's executor/translator plugin architecture exactly: discovery by convention, standard interface, independent operation, composability through aggregation
Gate plugins exit 3 (SKIP) is critical --- it means plugins auto-detect missing evidence and gracefully skip rather than failing
Scope-check.sh demonstrates the pattern for NEW gates: add checks by creating files, not editing phase-gate.sh
residualRisk: Gate plugins are committed but not yet in production agent workflow (agent must remember to call --check-quality). The plugin wrappers forward to the underlying scripts but don't yet cache results or support the cooldown/backoff pattern from error-counter. Decision pipeline composition (Upgrade 3) and dynamic autonomy cascade (Upgrade 2) not yet implemented.
immediateNextSteps: New session: Dynamic Autonomy Cascade (Upgrade 2) --- add start/adjust subcommands to autonomy-gate.sh for mid-phase adjustment
New session: Decision Pipeline Composition (Upgrade 3) --- create decision-pipeline.sh to chain decision types at phase transitions
New session: Cooldown + Backoff in error-counter.sh (Upgrade 4)
New session: Unified Dashboard (Upgrade 5) --- session-dashboard.sh aggregating all gate state
No push needed --- origin/main worktree; merge s83-gate-plugin-discovery when ready
resumeRules: Read session-state.json first on every resume
Question Gate is automatic: vague requests trigger the Clarification Protocol before implementation
CATFISH workflow: plan-guard.sh --challenge then plan-challenge.sh prompt/reconcile for subagent dissent
Recognition workflow: comprehension-gate.sh extract before implement, verify via quality-gate
Decision workflow: decision.sh evaluate/log/review/audit for structured decision-making
Triple Debt: triple-debt.sh assess at task boundaries; integrate with retrospect via --debt
Gate plugins: phase-gate.sh <phase> --check-quality auto-discovers plugins from scripts/gates/<phase>/*.sh
Adding a gate check: create scripts/gates/<phase>/<name>.sh with standard exit codes (0=pass, 1=fail, 2=warn, 3=skip)
doNotRepeat: 2026-05-13: Researched cognitive surrender using only webfetch --- blind to Google results. Use websearch first.

events.summary: Session 83: Cognitive surrender mitigation --- CATFISH protocol (plan-challenge.sh), Recognition model (comprehension-gate.sh), Decision scaffold (decision.sh), Triple Debt tracking (triple-debt.sh), Research sufficiency (research-sufficiency.sh), Quality-speed gate (quality-speed-gate.sh), Unified phase gate (phase-gate.sh --check-quality), Post-failure decision (error-counter.sh decide/classify), File-level edit decision (file-decision.sh), Commit signal (session-boundary.sh). 14 commits, 9 new scripts, 68 tests (up from 59). Remote synced.
filesChanged: commands/plan.md (++ CATFISH + research sufficiency + unified gate)
events.verification: 68 tests pass. Quality gate clean. JSON logs validate. Branch management: multiple worktrees forked, merged, cleaned. Remote synced.

events.summary: Gate Plugin Discovery: phase-gate.sh converted from hardcoded delegation to convention-based plugin discovery. 8 gate plugins created in scripts/gates/{research,plan,implement,verify}/. New scope-check gate added. 74 tests (up from 68). All plugins independently runnable with standard exit codes.
filesChanged: scripts/gates/ (NEW directory --- 8 plugins: research/sufficiency, plan/catfish, plan/scope-check, implement/comprehension, implement/preflight, implement/decisions, implement/autonomy, verify/quality-speed)
scripts/phase-gate.sh (REWORKED --- quality checks section replaced with auto-discovery engine)
scripts/test-smoke.sh (6 new P12 gate plugin discovery tests)
events.verification: 74 tests pass (68 unchanged + 6 new). All 4 phases discover correct plugins. Plugins auto-skip on missing evidence.
